headline: U.S. Consumer Sentiment Index Hits Five-Month High: 5 Top Picks
summary: U.S. consumer sentiment hit a five-month high as energy costs fell. CTAS, CZR, NCLH, NWSA and VIK are five consumer discretionary picks for H2 2026.
